name: Slime Drop
short_description: Drop Slimes into the box, merge two Slimes of the same kind to evolve them to the next tier, if a slime drops out of the box, you lose. See if you can reach the last Monster Slime in the evolution chain and achieve the highest of scores before you lose the game.
detailed_description:
Join The Community


About the Game

Main Gameplay Loop

- Drop Slimes into the box .

- Merge two Slimes of the same kind to evolve them to the next tier.

- If a slime drops out of the box, you lose.

- Repeat.

Features

- Merge three Slimes of the same kind to skip a tier.

- Chain multiple merges in quick succession to gain a combo multiplier for a higher score.

- Change the colors of the box and the background to your liking.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
